integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your favourite tools to keep your workflow in sync.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Send issue updates and notifications to channels.

linearAsksForSlack.name: Linear Asks for Slack
linearAsksForSlack.description: Capture and track requests directly from Slack.

github.name: GitHub
github.description: Link pull requests and automate workflows.

figma.name: Figma
figma.description: Sync designs and embed live previews in issues.

gitlab.name: GitLab
gitlab.description: Link merge requests and track deployments.

zapier.name: Zapier
zapier.description: Automate tasks between Linear and thousands of apps.

jira.name: Jira
jira.description: Migrate issues and sync project status with Jira.

googleSheets.name: Google Sheets
googleSheets.description: Export issue data to spreadsheets automatically.

cursor.name: Cursor
cursor.description: Open and work on issues directly inside Cursor.

githubCopilot.name: GitHub Copilot
githubCopilot.description: Bring Copilot agent tasks into your Linear workflow.

factory.name: Factory
factory.description: Automate code reviews and pull request workflows.

sentryAgent.name: Sentry Agent
sentryAgent.description: Automatically triage and fix Sentry errors.

devin.name: Devin
devin.description: Assign issues to Devin for autonomous implementation.

chatPRD.name: ChatPRD
chatPRD.description: Generate product specs from issue descriptions.

charlie.name: Charlie
charlie.description: AI assistant integrated into your Linear workspace.

cursorMCP.name: Cursor MCP
cursorMCP.description: Access Linear context inside Cursor via MCP.

chatGPT.name: ChatGPT
chatGPT.description: Create and search issues from ChatGPT.

claude.name: Claude
claude.description: Use Claude to draft, refine and summarise issues.

v0.name: v0
v0.description: Generate UI components from issue requirements.

windsurf.name: Windsurf
windsurf.description: Resolve Linear issues inside the Windsurf editor.

replit.name: Replit
replit.description: Build and iterate on issues directly in Replit.

dust.name: Dust
dust.description: Deploy AI assistants connected to your Linear data.

adk.name: ADK
adk.description: Build custom agents with Google's Agent Development Kit.

pagerDuty.name: PagerDuty
pagerDuty.description: Create incidents and link on-call alerts to issues.

sentry.name: Sentry
sentry.description: Attach error reports to issues and track fixes.

vsCode.name: VS Code
vsCode.description: Manage issues without leaving your editor.

datadog.name: Datadog
datadog.description: Link monitoring alerts to Linear issues automatically.

incidentIo.name: incident.io
incidentIo.description: Connect incidents to issues and track resolution.

raycast.name: Raycast
raycast.description: Search, create and update issues from Raycast.

notion.name: Notion
notion.description: Embed Linear views and sync projects with Notion.
